<> ```php $string = "New post on the site http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1

"; $replacement = "http://yahoo.com/abc1"; $string = str_replace("http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1", $replacement, $string); echo $string; ``` This code replaces the URL `http://stackoverflow.com/xyz1` with `http://yahoo.com/abc1` in the given string. The replacement is done using `str_replace`, which works for repeating strings as well. A palindrome in this context is a string that reads the same forwards and backwards. For example, "madam" or "racecar". The code above does not contain a palindrome, but you can add one by modifying the string or adding a palindrome to the output.
